creator: fenner@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks!  Two suggestions for future submissions: 
1. Explicitly note the added or removed files; I noticed the CVS 
messages saying that patches/* were removed, but it's nicer to 
have them explicitly noted. 
2. The pkg/PLIST is usually sorted (excluding the @ lines, usually).
